[[File:Bantha_Traxx_toy.jpg|thumb|Bantha Traxx Boutique gift shop sold [[stuffed bantha]]s.]]

'''Bantha Traxx''' was an extensive restaurant and entertainment complex located in the upper-class areas of [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. It was established in the old [[Club Vortex]] building. The business was owned by [[Yin Vocta]] and quickly became popular with a rich and powerful clientele. The [[Gathering of the Herd]] music festival was held annually at Bantha Traxx.

The huge building contained, among other things, a restaurant, bar, gift shop, and a dance floor. The entire place was designed in a desert style with traditional Liann architecture. This was done as a tribute to Vocta's love for the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which was also the reason for the glowing [[Neon/Legends|neon]] [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] above the elaborate entrance to the complex.

Bantha Traxx was technically a subsidiary of [[Vector Technologies]], also run by Yin Vocta.
